name: Sweet and Sour Red Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy stainless steel or enamel skillet, sauté the cabbage and garlic for 3 to 4 minutes, stirring frequently to coat well with oil.
2. Add the remaining ingredients. Stir until everything is combined well.
3. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 40 to 60 minutes, or until tender.
